## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output if available.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Arch Linux)
- Python version: (`python3 --version`)
- OpenSSL version: (`openssl version`)
- secure-messenger version: (e.g. v2.0.0)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant info — screenshots, logs, network setup, etc.
